en.bio: Experienced Full-stack Consultant and Project Manager with a proven track record of delivering complex web projects end-to-end. Proficient in Vue, Nuxt.js, React, Node.js, Go, Python, Docker, and Kubernetes, with hands-on experience across multiple database technologies. Strong project management and client relations skills, backed by a Master's degree in Management Engineering.

it.bio: Consulente Full-stack e Project Manager con una comprovata esperienza nella consegna end-to-end di progetti web complessi. Competenze in Vue, Nuxt.js, React, Node.js, Go, Python, Docker e Kubernetes, con esperienza pratica su diverse tecnologie di database. Solide capacità di project management e gestione delle relazioni con i clienti, supportate da una Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria Gestionale.
